Home.title: Welcome to IMDb
Home.description: Watch your favorite movies and TV shows

About.title: About IMDb
About.content: IMDb is the world's most popular and authoritative source for movie, TV show, and celebrity content. We provide comprehensive information about films, television series, streaming content, and entertainment news. Our platform offers users access to ratings, reviews, trailers, showtimes, and entertainment news. Founded with a passion for cinema, IMDb continues to be the go-to destination for entertainment enthusiasts worldwide.

Careers.title: Careers
Careers.content: At IMDb, we're building the future of entertainment. We're looking for passionate individuals who love movies, TV, and technology. Our team works on cutting-edge problems at scale, serving millions of users worldwide. Explore opportunities across engineering, product, design, marketing, and content.

Press.title: Press
Press.content: Welcome to the IMDb press room. Here you'll find company announcements, media resources, and press contacts. For press inquiries, please reach out to our communications team.

Faq.title: FAQ
Faq.content: Find answers to commonly asked questions about using IMDb. Topics include account management, ratings and reviews, content information, troubleshooting, and more. If you can't find what you're looking for, please contact our support team.

Contact.title: Contact Us
Contact.content: We'd love to hear from you. Whether you have a question, feedback, or partnership inquiry, reach out to us and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.

Feedback.title: Feedback
Feedback.content: Your feedback helps us improve IMDb. Let us know what you love, what you'd like to see changed, or any features you'd like us to add. We read every submission and appreciate your input.

Terms.title: Terms of Use
Terms.content: These Terms of Use govern your use of the IMDb website and services. By accessing or using IMDb, you agree to be bound by these terms. Please read them carefully. Our services are provided on an 'as is' basis, and we reserve the right to update these terms at any time.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.content: Your privacy is important to us. This Privacy Policy explains how IMDb collects, uses, discloses, and safeguards your information when you use our platform. We are committed to protecting your personal data and being transparent about our practices.

Cookies.title: Cookie Preferences
Cookies.content: IMDb uses cookies and similar technologies to enhance your browsing experience, analyze site traffic, and deliver personalized content. You can manage your cookie preferences at any time. Cookies help us remember your preferences and improve our services.
